module.name: protocol
module.purpose: Owns the marix-protocol crate definitions and namespace exports for reusable session, task, step, execution, and tool protocol contracts. The crate now depends on marix-common so execution Preview events can include host System alongside tool previews.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task protocol contracts including task identifiers, events, request previews, signature-free TaskPreview request/result snapshots, signatures, results, and statuses.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step protocol contracts including executable drafts, planning output, kinds, signatures with descriptions, events, results, statuses, and previews.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns execution protocol contracts including execution ids, events whose Preview carries System and ToolPreview values, requests, signatures, updates, and statuses.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Owns tool schema and preview protocol contracts.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Local third-party re-export wiring for protocol internals.
